desires: Secure the maximum possible credit for the term project before Thursday's deadline to establish a baseline of excellence.

goals.description: Execute the term project module for 90 minutes in a deep-work block, prioritizing output volume and accuracy to maximize academic credit before Thursday.
goals.rationale: My value hierarchy places academic outcomes at 50% weight; completing this high-velocity task now secures the primary payoff. Given my soft hardness rating and current progress (88%), I can push through without burning out, provided I strictly enforce the 22:30 digital curfew to protect my sleep debt recovery. Social friction is negligible compared to the ROI of this grade.

goals.description: Draft a concise status update for cohort_3 regarding the project timeline to preemptively address reliability concerns without engaging in low-value social pleasantries.
goals.rationale: I must avoid any appearance of unreliability to cohort_3 by completing at least one high-visibility task today to maintain my assertive reputation. However, since I am maintaining strict boundaries on social obligations for the next 48 hours to preserve focus capacity, a brief, direct text notification is sufficient to signal commitment. This minimizes emotional labor while securing the necessary reputational capital for future collaboration.

goals.description: Complete the trivial chore immediately after the work block ends to generate an instant behavioral calibration win without wasting energy on reflection.
goals.rationale: While this provides immediate dopamine and reinforces discipline, it cannot compete with the long-term horizon of the term project deadline. Deferring this to post-work ensures I maintain physical stamina for the final sprint, adhering to my sleep discipline heuristic which outweighs the need for an instant win. The 'instant win' is secondary to the strategic investment required for the term project.
